html:query.declare: <DATOS> <ROWS nmd-col="1"> <ROW id="11465" /> <ROW id="11466" /> <ROW id="11470" /> <ROW id="11471" /> <ROW id="11496" /> <ROW id="11467" /> <ROW id="11497" /> <ROW id="11498" /> <ROW id="11468" /> <ROW id="11499" /> <ROW id="11500" /> <ROW id="11469" /> <ROW id="11501" /> <ROW id="11502" /> <ROW id="11503" /> <ROW id="11504" /> <ROW id="11505" /> <ROW id="11506" /> <ROW id="11509" /> <ROW id="11510" /> <ROW id="11464" /> <ROW id="11511" /> <ROW id="11513" /> <ROW id="11514" /> <ROW id="11554" /> </ROWS> <DATOS oi_empresa="164" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="40" oi_variable="" report="" gpers="" gcustom="" e_periodo="200802" oi_centro_costo="267" oi_int_cont="2" c_cuenta="20000" agrupar="Cuenta" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" legajo_desde="" legajo_hasta="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" /> </DATOS>

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.
No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: qry_c_cuenta
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta
FROM LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT WHERE LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_int_cont = {#PARAMIN:@oi_int_contFIL} AND LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta = {#PARAMIN:@c_cuentaFIL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_centro_costo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG08_CS_COSTO.c_centro_costo , ORG08_CS_COSTO.d_centro_costo , ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_centro_costo FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO WHERE ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_centro_costo = {#PARAMIN:@oi_centro_costoFIL}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_liquidacion
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion , LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacionFIL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: filtro_centro_costo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG08_CS_COSTO.c_centro_costo FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO WHERE ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_centro_costo = {#PARAMIN:@oi_centro_costoFIL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_empresas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS where ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAMIN:@oi_empresaFIL}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_ic
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ21_INT_CONT.oi_int_cont, LIQ21_INT_CONT.c_int_contable, LIQ21_INT_CONT.d_int_contable FROM LIQ21_INT_CONT where LIQ21_INT_CONT.oi_int_cont = {#PARAMIN:@oi_int_contFIL}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_gcc
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.c_grupo_ccosto as gcc, ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.d_grupo_ccosto FROM ORG09_GR_CCOSTO, ORG08_CS_COSTO WHERE ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_grupo_ccosto = ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.oi_grupo_ccosto AND ORG08_CS_COSTO.c_centro_costo IN ( SELECT P97.c_centro_costo_ult as cc FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L19, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E19, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L99, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS P97, LIQ99_RECIBOS AS P99 WHERE L19.oi_empresa = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_empresaFIL%} AND L19.e_periodo = {%=#PARAMIN:@e_periodoFIL%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacionFIL!='') {% and L19.oi_liquidacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacionFIL %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_centro_costoFIL!='') {% and P97.c_centro_costo_ult = \'{%= #PARAMIN_CCOSTO:@c_filtro_costo %}\' %} {% %} %} AND L99.c_estado = \'F\' AND L19.oi_liquidacion = E19.oi_liquidacion AND E19.oi_liquidacion_ddo = L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND L99.oi_liquidacion_ddo = P99.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND P97.c_empresa = L99.c_empresa AND P97.e_numero_legajo = P99.e_numero_legajo GROUP BY P97.c_centro_costo_ult) UNION SELECT ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.c_grupo_ccosto as gcc , ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.d_grupo_ccosto FROM ORG09_GR_CCOSTO, ORG08_CS_COSTO WHERE ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_grupo_ccosto = ORG09_GR_CCOSTO.oi_grupo_ccosto AND ORG08_CS_COSTO.c_centro_costo IN ( SELECT D97a.c_centro_costo as cc FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L19a, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E19a, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L99a, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS P97a, LIQ99_RECIBOS AS P99a, LIQ97_DISTRIB_COS AS D97a WHERE L19a.oi_empresa = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_empresaFIL%} AND L19a.e_periodo = {%=#PARAMIN:@e_periodoFIL%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacionFIL!='') {% and L19a.oi_liquidacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacionFIL %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_centro_costoFIL!='') {% and P97a.c_centro_costo_ult = \'{%= #PARAMIN_CCOSTO:@c_filtro_costo %}\' %} {% %} %} AND L99a.c_estado = \'F\' AND L19a.oi_liquidacion = E19a.oi_liquidacion AND E19a.oi_liquidacion_ddo = L99a.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND L99a.oi_liquidacion_ddo = P99a.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND P97a.e_numero_legajo = P99a.e_numero_legajo AND P97a.c_empresa = L99a.c_empresa AND P97a.oi_per_emp_ddo = D97a.oi_per_emp_ddo GROUP BY D97a.c_centro_costo) order by gcc ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_cuenta
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta FROM LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT WHERE LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_int_cont = {#PARAMIN:@oi_int_contFIL} {%? (#PARAMIN:@c_cuentaFIL!='') {% and LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta = {#PARAMIN:@c_cuentaFIL} %} {% %} %} GROUP by LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta ORDER BY c_cuenta ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_porSecuencia
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_concepto, LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_tipo_concepto, LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_personal_emp, LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_d_h, LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.e_secuencia, LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_operador FROM LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT WHERE LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta = {#SOURCE:@c_cuenta} and LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.oi_int_cont = {#PARAMIN:@oi_int_contFIL} {%? (#PARAMIN:@c_cuentaFIL!='') {% and LIQ21_DET_INT_CONT.c_cuenta = {#PARAMIN:@c_cuentaFIL} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY e_secuencia ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: debe
qry:attribute.value: iif($r/@c_d_h='D', iif($r/@c_operador='+', number(@debe) + number(@valor), number(@debe) - number(@valor)),@debe)

qry:attribute.name: haber
qry:attribute.value: iif($r/@c_d_h='H', iif($r/@c_operador='+', number(@haber) + number(@valor), number(@haber) - number(@valor)),@haber)

qry:select.name: qry_porSuma
